info.description: Backend API for Gym Pro - A fitness tracking mobile application
info.title: Gym Pro API

post.description: Authenticate user with email and password
Get a new access token using refresh token
Request an OTP code to be sent via email for registration
Verify OTP code and create user account
Request an OTP code to be sent via email for resetting password
Verify OTP code for resetting password

get.description: Retrieve food items with pagination (system foods + own custom foods)

post.description: Create a new custom or system food based on user role
Identifies foods in an image and returns matching records from the database

get.description: Search food items by name, category, or system flag
Retrieve a food item by ID

put.description: Update a food item's details (must be owner or admin for system foods)

delete.description: Delete a custom food item (must be owner)

get.description: Get user nutrition daily target by date
get.summary: Get user nutrition target for a specific date

post.description: Create a new meal log entry. You can include initial items (food or recipe) in the same request.

get.description: Retrieve all meal logs for a specific date (YYYY-MM-DD) along with the daily nutrition summary
Returns distinct YYYY-MM-DD values in the range that have at least one meal log
Get nutrition statistics for a date period
Retrieve a single meal log entry with all food/recipe items

put.description: Update notes, mood, energy level and/or replace all items of a meal log

delete.description: Delete a meal log and all its items

get.description: Retrieve user's recipes and public recipes. Can filter by recipe name using 'query' param.

post.description: Create a new recipe with optional foods and image

get.description: Retrieve a recipe by ID with dynamically calculated nutrition

put.description: Update a recipe details or foods

parameters.description: Foods JSON string array to replace old foods: [{\
parameters.name: foods

put.description: Upload a new avatar image for the user

post.description: Send OTP to new email for verification before updating email
Verify OTP for new email and update user's email

get.description:
Get user nutrition target
Latest weight per day/week/month bucket in the given timezone
Get total workouts and total workout days for the current user

Get user nutrition target
Latest weight per day/week/month bucket in the given timezone
Get a paginated list of user's workout plans

post.description: Create a new workout plan for the authenticated user

get.description: Get workout plan details with exercises

get.summary: Get workout sessions for a date
Get dates in month that have scheduled workouts

get.description: Get weekly training summary with week-over-week trends and recommendations

get.summary: Get session detail for tracking screen

patch.summary: Finish session in one request (batch sets + session completion)

category.description: protein, carb, vegetable, fruit, dairy, etc.

items.description: Items, when non-nil, replaces ALL existing items in the meal log.

start_now.description: true = set status in_progress, started_at = now

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
